data.title: CoStar Group Q1 2026 Revenue Grows 23% Year-over-Year to $897 Million, Increases From $732 Million in Q1 2025, Annualized Net New Bookings of $67 Million, up 20% Year-over-Year
data.description: CoStar Group, Inc. shared that their revenue for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, amounted to $897 million, reflecting a 23% increase from the same period in 2025 which saw revenue at $732 million. Net income for the first quarter of 2026 stood at $3 million, with earnings per diluted share at $0.01. This marked a significant improvement from a net loss of $15 million during the corresponding period in the previous year. CoStar Group, Inc., a prominent provider of online real estate platforms, information, analytics, and 3D digital twin technology for property markets, made this announcement today.

data.title: Porch Group Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Seattle-based Porch Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: PRCH) announced strong first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026. The company, a unique homeowners insurance provider, exceeded expectations and consequently increased its full-year guidance. In Q1 2026, Porch reported revenue of $109.4 million for shareholders. The net loss attributed to Porch was $(4.7) million, while Adjusted EBITDA stood at $19.7 million. This positive performance has allowed the company to provide an optimistic outlook for the rest of the year.

data.title: T-Mobile Delivers Continued Durable Postpaid Account and ARPA Growth, Translating to Best-in-Class Financial Growth, Raises Guidance
data.description: In Bellevue, Washington, T-Mobile US, Inc. (NASDAQ: TMUS) reported a surge in account growth and customer engagement. The company added 217,000 postpaid net accounts, marking a 6% increase compared to the previous year. The Postpaid Average Revenue Per Account (ARPA) also saw growth, reaching $151.93, a 3.9% increase year-over-year. This uptick in account acquisitions translated to robust financial growth, with service revenues hitting $18.8 billion, an 11% increase year-over-year, positioning T-Mobile as a leader in industry growth.

data.title: Veradigm Receives KLAS 2026 Points of Light Award for Embedding SDOH Data in Provider EHR Workflows
data.description: Veradigm (MDRX), a top clinical and revenue cycle solutions provider for independent practices, has been honored by KLAS in the 2026 Points of Light Award program for integrating payer-derived social determinants of health (SDOH) data into provider EHR workflows. This recognition was part of the KLAS K2 Collaborative and showcased a joint initiative involving Veradigm, achieving recognition for their efforts. This acknowledgment highlights the importance of incorporating SDOH data into healthcare operations and improving patient outcomes, emphasizing the significance of such collaborations industry-wide.

data.title: Magnachip Reports Results for First Quarter 2026
data.description: In South Korea, Magnachip Semiconductor Corporation (NYSE: MX) unveiled its financial performance for Q1 2026. CEO Camillo Martino expressed satisfaction with achieving revenue growth exceeding seasonal norms, attributing it to effective execution and the expected outcomes from inventory and channel strategies. The company remains on track with its long-term transformation goals and is showcasing positive trends in its operations.

data.title: Lattice Semiconductor Schedules First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call
data.description: HILLSBORO, Ore.-- Lattice Semiconductor Corporation (Nasdaq: LSCC) disclosed plans for its Q1 2026 conference call scheduled for May 4, 2026. Ford Tamer, CEO, and Lorenzo Flores, CFO, will provide insights on the company's financial performance and future prospects. For those interested in tuning in, the live audio call will commence at 5 p.m. Eastern Time on May 4, 2026. To join the call, dial 1-877-407-3982 or 1-2.

data.title: InvenTrust Properties Corp. Reports 2026 First Quarter Results
data.description: InvenTrust Properties Corp. (NYSE: IVT) based in Downers Grove, Illinois, announced their financial and operational performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. During this period, the company disclosed a Net Income of $5.2 million, translating to $0.07 per diluted share, compared to a Net Income of $6.8 million, or $0.09 per diluted share, for the same period in 2025. In the first quarter of 2026, InvenTrust reported Nareit FFO of $0.53 per diluted share and Core FFO of $0.49 per diluted share.

data.title: PPG reports first quarter 2026 financial results
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, PPG (NYSE: PPG) announced its financial results. The company reported $3,930 million in net sales, representing a 7% increase from the first quarter of 2025, which had $3,684 million in net sales. Net income for the first quarter of 2026 was $382 million, a 2% increase from the $375 million reported in the same period last year. Adjusted net income also saw a rise of 4%, reaching $411 million compared to $396 million in the first quarter of 2025. Earnings per share (EPS) from continuing operations were $1.70 in Q1 2026, up 4% from the $1.64 reported in Q1 2025. Adjusted EPS showed growth as well, with $1.83 in Q1 2026 compared to $1.72 in Q1 2025, representing a 6% increase. Tim Knavish, Chairman and CEO of PPG, provided comments on the results.

data.title: Ribbon Communications Announces Promotion of Rick Marmurek to Chief Financial Officer
data.description: Plano, TX - April 28, 2026 - Ribbon Communications Inc., a prominent company in real-time communications technology and IP optical networking solutions, disclosed that Rick Marmurek, the current Deputy CFO and Chief Accounting Officer, has been appointed the Head of Finance. This development marks a significant step for the company, which trades on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol RBBN.

data.title: Rocky Brands, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Nelsonville, Ohio, Rocky Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: RCKY) reported its financial results for the first quarter ending March 31, 2026. Net sales saw a 9.1% increase to $124.4 million compared to the previous year. However, the gross margin decreased by 470 basis points, now standing at 36.5% of net sales, down from 41.2% in the same quarter last year. Income from operations took a hit, dropping by 58.2% to $3.6 million, down from $8.7 million in the prior year. Net income also saw a significant decline, decreasing by 74.5% to an undisclosed value.

data.title: CUPE's Extendicare Central Table Receives Overwhelming Mandate for Job Action if a Deal is not Reached
data.description: This week in Markham, CUPE's Extendicare Central Bargaining table is conducting strategic planning meetings following the conclusion of negotiations with Extendicare a month ago. Eight CUPE locals from Ontario, representing more than 1100 Long-Term Care workers at various Extendicare facilities in the province, are involved. The central bargaining table establishes the framework for collective bargaining in the sector. Bargaining between Extendicare and the Central Table ceased on April 1st, with several unresolved issues.

data.title: Ribbon Communications Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Confidence in growth momentum is rising for Ribbon Communications Inc. as demand continues to increase in new markets such as AIOps and Data Center Interconnect. The first quarter revenue for 2026 aligns with expectations, showcasing promising growth prospects. Based in Plano, Texas, the company is gaining optimism for sequential and second half 2026, with a focus on expanding its presence in emerging sectors. The company's performance, including a notable increase in demand, is a key indicator of their success in capturing market opportunities.

data.title: Omnicom Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In the first quarter of 2026, core operations reported revenue of $5.6 billion with a 3.9% organic growth rate. The non-GAAP adjusted EBITA was $833.5 million, reflecting a 14.8% margin. The total revenue for the quarter was $6.2 billion. The diluted earnings per share were $1.35, or $1.90 on a non-GAAP adjusted basis, showing an increase compared to the previous period.

data.title: Caesars Entertainment, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Caesars Entertainment, Inc. disclosed its first-quarter performance for the period ending March 31, 2026, with key highlights including a GAAP net revenue of $2.9 billion, showcasing a growth from $2.8 billion in the previous year. The company reported a GAAP net loss of $98 million in contrast to the net loss of $115 million during the same period last year. Consolidated Adjusted EBITDA stood at $887 million compared to $88 million previously. The company operates under the tickers CZR and CEI on the NASDAQ stock exchange.

BOOKING HOLDINGS POSTED Q1 REVENUE OF $5,500 MILLION, NARROWLY TRAILING THE IBES ESTIMATE OF $5,517 MILLION, WITH Q1 EPS AT $1.36 AND NET INCOME OF $1,100 MILLION, WHILE ADJUSTED EPS OF $1.14 SURPASSED THE IBES FORECAST OF $1.08.
STARBUCKS 2Q COMP SALES +6.2%, EST. +3.65%

data.title: Cryo-Cell International Receives FACT Re-accreditation, Setting the Longest Independently Validated Quality Track Record Among U.S. Private Cord Blood Banks
data.description: Cryo-Cell International, Inc., a private cord blood bank traded on NYSE American LLC under the symbol CCEL, has successfully obtained renewed Foundation for the Accreditation of Cellular Therapy (FACT) Accreditation for Cord Blood Collection, Banking, and Release for Administration (Related and Unrelated) Donations. Initially accredited in 2014, the company has secured another three-year accreditation extension. The renewed accreditation will remain effective until Ap.

data.title: SR BANCORP, INC. ANNOUNCES FINANCIAL RESULTS
data.description: A financial institution in Bound Brook, New Jersey, SR Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: SRBK), which owns Somerset Regal Bank, reported a net income of $886,000 for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026. This translates to earnings of $0.12 per basic and diluted share, marking a notable increase compared to the previous period.

data.title: Washington Trust elects Jeffrey M. Wilhelm to Board of Directors
data.description: Westerly, Rhode Island - On April 28, 2026, Washington Trust Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: WASH) revealed the appointment of Jeffrey M. Wilhelm to its boards. With over 25 years of expertise in data, technology, and digital transformation, Wilhelm is recognized as a prominent figure in the industry. This move signifies the Corporation's commitment to capitalizing on his extensive knowledge in these areas.

data.title: Carlsmed, Inc. To Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: In an announcement on April 28, 2026, Carlsmed, Inc. (Nasdaq: CARL), led by Mike Cordonnier as Chairman and CEO, revealed their participation in upcoming investor conferences.
